data.title: Why digital B2B buyers are frustrated — and what sellers must do to fix it
data.description: A significant 87% of Millennial and Generation Z buyers (born in 1981 or later) report dissatisfaction in at least one area, compared to 73% of older buyers (Generation X and Baby Boomers, born before 1981).

data.title: Air freight tonnage soars with ecommerce growth
data.description: The rapid expansion of ecommerce and express logistics networks is poised to significantly boost air cargo demand. The entry of fresh players into the ecommerce market accelerated this growth in late 2023 and continues to underscore the critical role of air freight in the digital economy, where speed is paramount, Boeing says.

data.title: Kohl’s to bring on new CEO in January
data.description: Tom Kingsbury will step down as CEO at Kohl's on Jan. 15 as Ashley Buchanan takes his place.

data.title: Just 10% of top online retailers abstain from Cyber Monday promotions
data.description: Promotions ranged from 90% discounts vague holiday platitudes, but even those without Cyber Monday deals offered some holiday spirit.

data.title: CarParts.com navigates challenges and prepares for growth in B2B
data.description: The automotive ecommerce parts market is projected to exceed $23 billion in annual sales by 2026, according to the U.S. Auto Care Association. CarParts.com, with its recent initiatives, says it is well-positioned to capitalize on this growth.
